The '''Cracians''' were a people native to the [[Craci system/Legends|Craci system]]. Long before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they domesticated the [[Cracian thumper]] as a workbeast. They eventually marketed the animals to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large, to whom they became indispensable pack and riding animals.

{{Stub}}
